steps.name: Regenerate parent-tracking (BR-5) + compare()
steps.commit_sha: d4327ff (create() accepts parent_version; POST /versions body includes parent_version)

steps.name: Wire up tests — property test cascade + all Acceptance Criteria
steps.last_error: 11 unit tests (test_versioning_service.py) cover AC-1 through AC-5 (restore cascade, all_stale flag, scene_set diff, 404 error paths) against the real VersioningService using a FakeSession — all green. The property test (random create/restore sequence preserving 'current always determinable' / 'no version lost') from the task's Step 6 was NOT written — deferred alongside 1-3's integration/e2e gap, same root cause (no live Postgres in this sandbox to drive a meaningful property test against real DB constraints).

decisions: 2026-07-17: RUN-STATUS.md's prior note (main stub, real impl on origin/feat/1-5-versioning-engine) was accurate — merged that branch's versioning_service.py/schemas/version.py/api/versions.py wholesale after resolving one add/add conflict on versioning_service.py (took origin's real 160-line implementation over HEAD's 1-line stub).

app/api/versions.py as pushed to origin/feat/1-5-versioning-engine used `Depends(get_session)` — that function doesn't exist anywhere in app.core.database or app.core.deps (would 500 on every request). Rewrote the router to use the same `async with request.app.state.database.session() as db` pattern already used by app/api/projects.py and app/api/users.py, consistent with this codebase's actual convention (no FastAPI Depends-based session getter exists).

The origin branch's router only wired list/restore/compare — no create or current endpoints, despite the service already implementing create()/current(). Added POST /projects/{id}/steps/{step}/versions (create, BR-1/BR-5 parent_version) and GET .../current (BR-4 all_stale) to close that gap, plus a 409 guard on restore() when the project is in a RUNNING status (RESEARCHING/PRODUCING/RENDERING/PUBLISHING) per the task's AC-5 — the merged service itself didn't enforce this, only the router can (it owns the Project row).

docs/specs/api-spec.md §3 previously described a PUT-based create endpoint with no actor/parent_version — updated to match the POST-based implementation actually built (BR-5 needs parent_version to be settable), added the GET .../current row, documented staled_steps and the 409 running-guard. Logged inline under a 'Contract change note' per rules/documentation.md rather than silently diverging code from doc.

A local (not origin) branch also named close to this task, `feat/1-5-versioning-engine`, existed but was ~9 commits stale relative to main (predates 1-6/1-7/2-x/3-x work) and used an incompatible class name (`StepVersionService` vs. the real `VersioningService`) — correctly identified as not the real implementation and left untouched; the origin branch was the one RUN-STATUS.md's audit already correctly pointed at.
Step 6's property-test half deferred for the same reason as 1-3's integration tests: no live Postgres in this sandbox. Flagged in memory/project-memory.md Open Questions.
